name: coTfsCbGetSettings
title: coTfsCbGetSettings
syntax: long coTfsCbGetSettings( dword type, dword nodeId, dword cycleTime[1], dword tolerance[1] );
description: This function gets the set parameter of an active monitor.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 0 - Heartbeat message1 - Sync message2 - Sync PDO message3 - Guarding RTR message for request
